from tinylang.parser import parse


def names_of(stmts):
    return [type(s).__name__ for s in stmts]


def test_let_stmt():
    p = parse("let x = 1;")
    assert names_of(p.stmts) == ["LetStmt"]
    ls = p.stmts[0]
    assert ls.name == "x"
    assert type(ls.value).__name__ == "NumberLit"
    assert ls.value.value == 1.0


def test_precedence_mul_before_add():
    p = parse("let x = 1 + 2 * 3;")
    rhs = p.stmts[0].value
    assert type(rhs).__name__ == "BinaryOp"
    assert rhs.op == "+"

def parse_logical_or(self) -> Expr:
        expr = self.parse_logical_and()
        while self.peek().kind == "PUNCT" and self.peek().value == "||":
            self.consume()
            right = self.parse_logical_and()
            expr = BinaryOp("||", expr, right)
        return expr

    def parse_logical_and(self) -> Expr:
        expr = self.parse_equality()
        while self.peek().kind == "PUNCT" and self.peek().value == "&&":
            self.consume()
            right = self.parse_equality()
            expr = BinaryOp("&&", expr, right)
        return expr
args.old_string:
def parse_logical_or(self) -> Expr:
        expr = self.parse_logical_and()
        while self.peek().kind == "KEYWORD" and self.peek().value == "||":
            self.consume()
            right = self.parse_logical_and()
            expr = BinaryOp("||", expr, right)
        return expr

    def parse_logical_and(self) -> Expr:
        expr = self.parse_equality()
        while self.peek().kind == "KEYWORD" and self.peek().value == "&&":
            self.consume()
            right = self.parse_equality()
            expr = BinaryOp("&&", expr, right)
        return expr
